tests.scenario: New user navigates to main features within 2 minutes
steps: Launch the app for the first time
tests.expected_result: The user is able to navigate to the main features within 2 minutes.

tests.scenario: User reports reduction in symptoms after using mental health management tools
steps: Use the app's mental health management tools for 2 weeks
Report symptoms before and after using the tools
tests.expected_result: The user reports a reduction in symptoms within 2 weeks.

tests.scenario: User data is encrypted and stored securely
steps: Use the app and generate personal data
tests.expected_result: The user's personal data is encrypted and stored securely.

tests.scenario: User reports higher satisfaction compared to other mental health apps
steps: Use the app and other mental health apps
tests.expected_result: The user reports a higher level of satisfaction compared to other apps.

tests.scenario: User reports increase in self-awareness within 1 month
steps: Use the app's self-awareness tools for 1 month
Report self-awareness level before and after using the tools
tests.expected_result: The user reports an increase in self-awareness within 1 month.

tests.scenario: User feels supported and connected within 1 week of joining a community group
steps: Interact with the community for 1 week
tests.expected_result: The user reports feeling supported and connected within 1 week.

tests.scenario: User feels the app provides value for money
tests.expected_result: The user reports feeling that the app provides value for money.

tests.scenario: User feels informed and motivated to improve mental well-being using analytics features
steps: Evaluate the insights and motivation gained
tests.expected_result: The user reports feeling informed and motivated to improve their mental well-being.

tests.scenario: User reports higher engagement and satisfaction using unique features
tests.expected_result: The user reports a higher level of engagement and satisfaction.

tests.scenario: User feels confident and comfortable using the app's features
tests.expected_result: The user reports feeling confident and comfortable using the app's features.
